channel.title: Nerra Network
channel.description: Ten podcasts in two languages keeping you informed about exciting changes in the world. Unbiased, multi-perspective coverage of Tesla, world news, space, science, AI, the environment, modern investing, financial literacy, and Russian language learning.

item.title: Ep 50: Artemis II has broken the Apollo-era human distance record from Earth while looping around the Moon’s far side.
item.description:
**HOOK:** Artemis II has broken the Apollo-era human distance record from Earth while looping around the Moon’s far side.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **Astroscale Clears CDR for UK Cubesats: 08 April 2026 • SpaceNews** Astroscale has completed the critical design review for two cubesats scheduled to launch next year for the British military. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 17: Google just dropped an AI that can dictate your essays perfectly — even with no internet. Your phone just got smarter offline.
item.description:
**# Models & Agents for Beginners** **Date:** April 08, 2026
**HOOK:** Google just dropped an AI that can dictate your essays perfectly — even with no internet. Your phone just got smarter offline.
**What's Cool Today:** Google quietly released a brand-new offline dictation app that runs on its Gemma AI models, meaning it can turn your spoken words into text without needing Wi-Fi or cell service. This is huge for students, creators, or anyone who wants privacy and speed. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**# Models & Agents for Beginners** **Date:** April 08, 2026
**HOOK:** Google just dropped an AI that can dictate your essays perfectly — even with no internet. Your phone just got smarter offline.
**What's Cool Today:** Google quietly released a brand-new offline dictation app that runs on its Gemma AI models, meaning it can turn your spoken words into text without needing Wi-Fi or cell service. This is huge for students, creators, or anyone who wants privacy and speed. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 17: Google just dropped an AI that can dictate your essays perfectly — even with no internet. Your phone just got smarter offline.

item.title: Финансы Просто - Episode 19 - April 08, 2026
item.description:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** April 08, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Наследство после тяжёлой утраты: как правильно начать, если вы никогда не занимались финансами
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня мы поговорим о очень непростой, но важной теме — что делать, если вы внезапно получили крупную сумму после потери близкого человека. Многие из нас, особенно иммигрантки, чувствуют себя совершенно потерянными в таких ситуациях. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** April 08, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Наследство после тяжёлой утраты: как правильно начать, если вы никогда не занимались финансами
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня мы поговорим о очень непростой, но важной теме — что делать, если вы внезапно получили крупную сумму после потери близкого человека. Многие из нас, особенно иммигрантки, чувствуют себя совершенно потерянными в таких ситуациях. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Финансы Просто - Episode 19 - April 08, 2026

item.title: Привет, Русский! - Episode 9 - April 08, 2026
item.description:
**Привет, Русский! — Episode Plan** **Date:** April 08, 2026 **Theme:** Space (Космос)
**Vocabulary List (10 words/phrases):**
- **Russian (Cyrillic):** космос **Transliteration:** KOS-mos **English:** space (the universe) **Example sentence:** Я люблю смотреть на космос. **Example translation:** I love looking at space. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**Привет, Русский! — Episode Plan** **Date:** April 08, 2026 **Theme:** Space (Космос)

- **Russian (Cyrillic):** космос **Transliteration:** KOS-mos **English:** space (the universe) **Example sentence:** Я люблю смотреть на космос. **Example translation:** I love looking at space. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Привет, Русский! - Episode 9 - April 08, 2026

item.title: Ep 15: Iran ceasefire triggers 15% oil plunge, unwinding the geopolitical premium and shifting capital across energy, currencies, and defensives.
item.description:
**# Modern Investing Techniques** **Date:** April 08, 2026 💰 **Modern Investing Techniques** — AI-Powered Daily Market Intelligence
**HOOK:** Iran ceasefire triggers 15% oil plunge, unwinding the geopolitical premium and shifting capital across energy, currencies, and defensives.
**Market Pulse:** Markets opened with relief after the US-Iran two-week ceasefire announcement. S&P 500 sits at 6,617 (+0.1%), NASDAQ Composite at 22,018 (+0.1%), and TSX Composite at 33,238 (+0.2%). ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

**# Modern Investing Techniques** **Date:** April 08, 2026 💰 **Modern Investing Techniques** — AI-Powered Daily Market Intelligence

AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 15: Iran ceasefire triggers 15% oil plunge, unwinding the geopolitical premium and shifting capital across energy, currencies, and defensives.

item.title: Ep 429: Tesla reclaims the global EV sales crown in Q1 by overtaking BYD despite a modest 6% vehicle delivery increase and softer energy growth.
item.description:
# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** April 07, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $352.82 ▲ $2.92 (0.8%)
**HOOK:** Tesla reclaims the global EV sales crown in Q1 by overtaking BYD despite a modest 6% vehicle delivery increase and softer energy growth.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 10 News Items 1. **Tesla Reclaims Global EV Sales Crown in Q1 2026, Surpassing BYD - 07 April, 2026, 04:45 AM PST, EVTech.News** Tesla overtook BYD in the first quarter to once again lead global EV sales. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 29: Trump issues Tuesday deadline threatening to strike Iranian infrastructure if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed, driving up oil prices and rattling markets.
item.description:
**# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing** **Date:** April 07, 2026
**HOOK:** Trump issues Tuesday deadline threatening to strike Iranian infrastructure if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed, driving up oil prices and rattling markets.

item.title: Ep 21: Ontario’s Species Conservation Act replaces the Endangered Species Act, leaving golden eagles, barn owls and many other species largely unprotected.
item.description:
**HOOK:** Ontario’s Species Conservation Act replaces the Endangered Species Act, leaving golden eagles, barn owls and many other species largely unprotected.
**Executive Summary:** Ontario has repealed the Endangered Species Act and enacted the Species Conservation Act, which experts state provides substantially weaker protections for numerous listed plants and animals. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**HOOK:** Ontario’s Species Conservation Act replaces the Endangered Species Act, leaving golden eagles, barn owls and many other species largely unprotected.
**Executive Summary:** Ontario has repealed the Endangered Species Act and enacted the Species Conservation Act, which experts state provides substantially weaker protections for numerous listed plants and animals. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 21: Ontario’s Species Conservation Act replaces the Endangered Species Act, leaving golden eagles, barn owls and many other species largely unprotected.

item.title: Ep 27: Gemma 4 delivers massive gains across European languages while a 25.6M Rust model achieves 50× faster inference via hybrid attention.
item.description:
**HOOK:** Gemma 4 delivers massive gains across European languages while a 25.6M Rust model achieves 50× faster inference via hybrid attention.
**What You Need to Know:** Google’s Gemma 4 (especially the 31B variant) has climbed to top-3 or better on nearly every major European language leaderboard according to EuroEval, often beating much larger models on Danish, Dutch, French, Italian and Finnish. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**HOOK:** Gemma 4 delivers massive gains across European languages while a 25.6M Rust model achieves 50× faster inference via hybrid attention.
**What You Need to Know:** Google’s Gemma 4 (especially the 31B variant) has climbed to top-3 or better on nearly every major European language leaderboard according to EuroEval, often beating much larger models on Danish, Dutch, French, Italian and Finnish. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 27: Gemma 4 delivers massive gains across European languages while a 25.6M Rust model achieves 50× faster inference via hybrid attention.

item.title: Ep 49: Artemis II astronauts have entered the Moon's sphere of influence, marking humanity's return to lunar space.
item.description:
**HOOK:** Artemis II astronauts have entered the Moon's sphere of influence, marking humanity's return to lunar space.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **Artemis II Reaches Lunar Space: 06 April 2026 • Space.com** The four astronauts of NASA's Artemis 2 mission entered the lunar sphere of influence early on April 6. This sets up the first crewed lunar flyby since 1972 and paves the way for future landings. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 16: AI can now get its own email, phone number, and even a wallet — the agent stack is here.
item.description:
**# Models & Agents for Beginners** **Date:** April 06, 2026
**HOOK:** AI can now get its own email, phone number, and even a wallet — the agent stack is here.
**What's Cool Today:** Today we’re seeing AI move from “chatbot on your screen” to something that feels more like a digital teammate with its own identity and tools. One team built a system that turns any PyTorch model into faster GPU code using an autonomous agent loop. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:

item.title: Финансы Просто - Episode 18 - April 06, 2026
item.description:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** 6 апреля 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Как не потерять деньги при оформлении RESP и EI — реальные истории от мам из Ванкувера
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня в обзоре сразу несколько историй от наших слушательниц, которые столкнулись с типичными ошибками в канадских финансах. Одна мама пытается разобраться с RESP для малыша после потери партнёра, другая — как правильно заявить EI и не переплатить налоги. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.description:

item.title: Ep 26: AutoAgent autonomously optimizes its own harness using the same model to reach #1 on Terminal-Bench and financial modeling in under 24 hours.
item.description:
**HOOK:** AutoAgent autonomously optimizes its own harness using the same model to reach #1 on Terminal-Bench and financial modeling in under 24 hours.
**What You Need to Know:** The open-source AutoAgent project demonstrates that the biggest limiter for agent performance isn't the underlying model but the quality of the harness (tools, prompts, and evaluation loops). ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**HOOK:** AutoAgent autonomously optimizes its own harness using the same model to reach #1 on Terminal-Bench and financial modeling in under 24 hours.
**What You Need to Know:** The open-source AutoAgent project demonstrates that the biggest limiter for agent performance isn't the underlying model but the quality of the harness (tools, prompts, and evaluation loops). ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 26: AutoAgent autonomously optimizes its own harness using the same model to reach #1 on Terminal-Bench and financial modeling in under 24 hours.

item.description:

item.title: Ep 14: Chinese companies now make 41% of the AI chips used inside China — here's why that matters for your future phone and games.
item.description:
**# Models & Agents for Beginners** **Date:** April 02, 2026
**HOOK:** Chinese companies now make 41% of the AI chips used inside China — here's why that matters for your future phone and games.
**What's Cool Today:** Chinese chipmakers have taken a huge slice of their home AI accelerator market, showing how fast local tech is growing. We also have a brand-new vision model from IBM that's built for reading documents, plus a study showing how easily AI agents can be tricked online. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**# Models & Agents for Beginners** **Date:** April 02, 2026
**HOOK:** Chinese companies now make 41% of the AI chips used inside China — here's why that matters for your future phone and games.
**What's Cool Today:** Chinese chipmakers have taken a huge slice of their home AI accelerator market, showing how fast local tech is growing. We also have a brand-new vision model from IBM that's built for reading documents, plus a study showing how easily AI agents can be tricked online. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Финансы Просто - Episode 17 - April 02, 2026
item.description:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** April 02, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Bank of Canada следит за войной на Ближнем Востоке, но держит ставки — что это значит для вашей ипотеки
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня главное — как Bank of Canada принимает решения по ставкам в условиях войны в Иране. Регулятор признаёт, что ситуация сложная, но не хочет, чтобы один риск затмил все остальные. Это напрямую касается каждой из нас в Ванкувере: от платежей по ипотеке до стоимости аренды в Burnaby или Surrey. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня главное — как Bank of Canada принимает решения по ставкам в условиях войны в Иране. item.title: Models & Agents - Episode 24 - April 01, 2026
item.description:
**What You Need to Know:** Hugging Face just shipped TRL v1.0, turning the messy post-training pipeline (SFT → Reward Modeling → DPO/GRPO) into a stable, production-ready unified API. Liquid AI dropped LFM2.5-350M, a 350M-parameter model trained on 28T tokens with scaled RL that challenges the “bigger is better” scaling narrative. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 23: Alibaba Qwen just dropped Qwen3.5-Omni, a native end-to-end multimodal model built for text, audio, video, and realtime interaction.
item.description:
**Models & Agents** **Date:** March 31, 2026
**HOOK:** Alibaba Qwen just dropped Qwen3.5-Omni, a native end-to-end multimodal model built for text, audio, video, and realtime interaction.
**What You Need to Know:** The biggest news today is the shift from patchwork multimodal wrappers to truly native omnimodal architectures, with Qwen3.5-Omni positioned as a direct challenger to Gemini 1.5 Pro and similar flagships. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 47: SpaceX is preparing to loft 119 small satellites in one rideshare launch from California this morning.
item.description:
# Fascinating Frontiers **Date:** March 30, 2026 🚀 **Fascinating Frontiers** - Space & Astronomy News
**HOOK:** SpaceX is preparing to loft 119 small satellites in one rideshare launch from California this morning.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **SpaceX Transporter-16 Readies 119 Payloads: DD March 2026 • Spaceflight Now** SpaceX will launch the 21st mission in its smallsat rideshare program aboard a Falcon 9 from Vandenberg Space Force Base at 4:02 a.m. PDT. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 17: Alberta Bill 23 would eliminate government deadlines to respond to citizen petitions under the Citizen Initiative Act.
item.description:
**Date:** March 30, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — Canadian Environmental Professional Briefing
**HOOK:** Alberta Bill 23 would eliminate government deadlines to respond to citizen petitions under the Citizen Initiative Act.
**Executive Summary:** Alberta’s proposed Bill 23 would substantively amend the Citizen Initiative Act for the third time since 2021, removing mandatory timelines for government action on citizen petitions and recall applications. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:

item.title: Ep 13: Bluesky just dropped an AI that builds your perfect social feed from a simple sentence — no coding needed.
item.description:

**HOOK:** Bluesky just dropped an AI that builds your perfect social feed from a simple sentence — no coding needed.
**What's Cool Today:** Today we’re seeing AI move from just chatting to actually building things for you, like custom social media feeds that match exactly what you want to see. ...

item.title: Финансы Просто - Episode 16 - March 30, 2026
item.description:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 30, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Ontario расширяет налоговую скидку на новые дома — что это значит для рынка недвижимости
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня поговорим о важном изменении в Онтарио, которое касается покупки нового жилья и возврата налогов. Хотя это происходит не в Британской Колумбии, такие новости помогают лучше понимать, как работают налоговые льготы при покупке дома в Канаде. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 30, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Ontario расширяет налоговую скидку на новые дома — что это значит для рынка недвижимости
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня поговорим о важном изменении в Онтарио, которое касается покупки нового жилья и возврата налогов. Хотя это происходит не в Британской Колумбии, такие новости помогают лучше понимать, как работают налоговые льготы при покупке дома в Канаде. ...
